question: Which program received the most applications?
query: SELECT Program.ProgramName, COUNT(Application.ApplicationID) AS ApplicationCount FROM Application INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID GROUP BY Application.ProgramID ORDER BY ApplicationCount DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the average NET score per test type?
query: SELECT EntryTest.TestType, AVG(TestScore.Score) AS AvgScore FROM TestScore INNER JOIN EntryTest ON EntryTest.TestID = TestScore.TestID GROUP BY EntryTest.TestType ORDER BY AvgScore DESC;

question: List all applicants who were selected for admission to BS Computer Science.
query: SELECT Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName FROM Applicant INNER JOIN Application ON Application.ApplicantID = Applicant.ApplicantID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID WHERE Program.DegreeType = 'BSCS' AND Application.Status IN ('Selected','Enrolled');

question: How many students are enrolled in each program?
query: SELECT Program.ProgramName, COUNT(Student.StudentID) AS StudentCount FROM Student INNER JOIN Application ON Application.ApplicationID = Student.ApplicationID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID GROUP BY Program.ProgramID ORDER BY StudentCount DESC;

question: What are the top 5 highest NET scores of all time?
query: SELECT Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, EntryTest.TestType, TestScore.Score FROM TestScore INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = TestScore.ApplicantID INNER JOIN EntryTest ON EntryTest.TestID = TestScore.TestID ORDER BY TestScore.Score DESC LIMIT 5;

question: How many rejected applicants scored above 140 in the NET?
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Applicant.ApplicantID) AS RejectedHighScorers FROM Applicant INNER JOIN Application ON Application.ApplicantID = Applicant.ApplicantID WHERE Application.Status = 'Rejected' AND Applicant.ApplicantID IN (SELECT TestScore.ApplicantID FROM TestScore WHERE TestScore.Score > 140);

question: Which school owns the most courses?
query: SELECT School.Name, COUNT(Course.CourseID) AS CourseCount FROM Course INNER JOIN School ON School.SchoolID = Course.SchoolID GROUP BY School.SchoolID ORDER BY CourseCount DESC LIMIT 5;

question: List all courses offered by SEECS.
query: SELECT Course.CourseCode, Course.CourseName, Course.Credits FROM Course INNER JOIN School ON School.SchoolID = Course.SchoolID WHERE School.Name = 'SEECS';

question: Which courses are shared across multiple programs?
query: SELECT Course.CourseCode, Course.CourseName, COUNT(ProgramCourse.ProgramID) AS NumPrograms FROM Course INNER JOIN ProgramCourse ON ProgramCourse.CourseID = Course.CourseID GROUP BY Course.CourseID HAVING NumPrograms > 1 ORDER BY NumPrograms DESC;

question: Which instructor is teaching the most sections in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT Instructor.FirstName, Instructor.LastName, COUNT(Section.SectionID) AS SectionCount FROM Section INNER JOIN Instructor ON Instructor.InstructorID = Section.InstructorID INNER JOIN Term ON Term.TermID = Section.TermID WHERE Term.TermName = 'Fall 2025' GROUP BY Section.InstructorID ORDER BY SectionCount DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show the full transcript (course, term, grade) for student 1.
query: SELECT Course.CourseCode, Course.CourseName, Term.TermName, Enrollment.Grade, Enrollment.Status FROM Enrollment INNER JOIN Section ON Section.SectionID = Enrollment.SectionID INNER JOIN Course ON Course.CourseID = Section.CourseID INNER JOIN Term ON Term.TermID = Section.TermID WHERE Enrollment.StudentID = 1 ORDER BY Term.StartDate;

question: How many students are currently enrolled in 'Database Systems'?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS EnrollmentCount FROM Enrollment INNER JOIN Section ON Section.SectionID = Enrollment.SectionID INNER JOIN Course ON Course.CourseID = Section.CourseID WHERE Course.CourseName = 'Database Systems' AND Enrollment.Status = 'InProgress';

question: Which applicants scored above the average score of the test they took?
query: SELECT Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, EntryTest.TestType, TestScore.Score FROM TestScore INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = TestScore.ApplicantID INNER JOIN EntryTest ON EntryTest.TestID = TestScore.TestID WHERE TestScore.Score > (SELECT AVG(ts2.Score) FROM TestScore ts2 WHERE ts2.TestID = TestScore.TestID);

question: What is the conversion rate (applications to students) for each school?
query: SELECT School.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT Application.ApplicationID) AS TotalApplications, COUNT(DISTINCT Student.StudentID) AS ConvertedStudents FROM School INNER JOIN Program ON Program.SchoolID = School.SchoolID LEFT JOIN Application ON Application.ProgramID = Program.ProgramID LEFT JOIN Student ON Student.ApplicationID = Application.ApplicationID GROUP BY School.SchoolID;

question: Show all students with CGPA above 3.5.
query: SELECT Student.StudentID, Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, Program.ProgramName, Student.CGPA FROM Student INNER JOIN Application ON Application.ApplicationID = Student.ApplicationID INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = Application.ApplicantID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID WHERE Student.CGPA > 3.5 ORDER BY Student.CGPA DESC;

question: Which classrooms are hosting more than 2 sections?
query: SELECT Classroom.RoomNumber, School.Name AS SchoolName, COUNT(Section.SectionID) AS SectionsHosted FROM Classroom INNER JOIN School ON School.SchoolID = Classroom.SchoolID LEFT JOIN Section ON Section.ClassroomID = Classroom.ClassroomID GROUP BY Classroom.ClassroomID HAVING SectionsHosted > 2 ORDER BY SectionsHosted DESC;

question: List all applicants from Lahore.
query: SELECT Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, Applicant.Email FROM Applicant WHERE Applicant.City = 'Lahore';

question: Which courses have no sections offered in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT Course.CourseCode, Course.CourseName FROM Course LEFT JOIN Section ON Section.CourseID = Course.CourseID AND Section.TermID = (SELECT Term.TermID FROM Term WHERE Term.TermName = 'Fall 2025') WHERE Section.SectionID IS NULL;

question: Which core courses does the BS Computer Science program require in its first two semesters?
query: SELECT Course.CourseCode, Course.CourseName, ProgramCourse.Semester FROM ProgramCourse INNER JOIN Course ON Course.CourseID = ProgramCourse.CourseID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = ProgramCourse.ProgramID WHERE Program.DegreeType = 'BSCS' AND ProgramCourse.CourseType = 'Core' AND ProgramCourse.Semester <= 2 ORDER BY ProgramCourse.Semester;

question: Rank all applicants for BSCS by their best NET score.
query: SELECT Application.ApplicationID, Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, MAX(TestScore.Score) AS BestScore, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(TestScore.Score) DESC) AS MeritRank FROM Application INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = Application.ApplicantID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID LEFT JOIN TestScore ON TestScore.ApplicantID = Applicant.ApplicantID WHERE Program.DegreeType = 'BSCS' GROUP BY Application.ApplicationID, Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName;

question: Which students have a failing grade (F) in any course?
query: SELECT Student.StudentID, Applicant.FirstName, Applicant.LastName, Course.CourseCode, Enrollment.Grade FROM Enrollment INNER JOIN Student ON Student.StudentID = Enrollment.StudentID INNER JOIN Application ON Application.ApplicationID = Student.ApplicationID INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = Application.ApplicantID INNER JOIN Section ON Section.SectionID = Enrollment.SectionID INNER JOIN Course ON Course.CourseID = Section.CourseID WHERE Enrollment.Grade = 'F';

question: Show all applications and their statuses for applicant Bilal Tariq.
query: SELECT Application.ApplicationID, Program.ProgramName, Application.Status, Application.ApplicationDate FROM Application INNER JOIN Applicant ON Applicant.ApplicantID = Application.ApplicantID INNER JOIN Program ON Program.ProgramID = Application.ProgramID WHERE Applicant.FirstName = 'Bilal' AND Applicant.LastName = 'Tariq';
